description.value:
An extraordinarily long Japanese field sword built for sweeping strikes against multiple enemies. Masters use its length to chain attacks across the battlefield with devastating efficiency.

Training

LevelProperties
UntrainedTwo-Handed, Heavy, Melee 2d6, Slashing
BasicTwo-Handed, Heavy, Melee 2d8, Deflect, Keen
MasterTwo-Handed, Heavy, Melee 2d8, Deflect, Keen â€” all bonuses apply
Master PerkWhen you attack a creature different from the last creature you attacked this turn, you deal an extra damage die on a hit.

rmeData.masterPerk: When you attack a creature different from the last creature you attacked this turn, you deal an extra damage die on a hit.
